title: ComplianceRadar
intent: Monitor regulatory changes and map deltas to internal controls and policies
requirements: feeds module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
normalization module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
impact-assessment module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
gap-mapping module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
tasks module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
alerts module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
